actual_current_surface_status: exact support/boundary / canonical O_H and WZ accepted-action common-cut certificate; current surface remains open

common_cut.why_common: The source-Higgs route needs canonical O_H before C_sH/C_HH row labels are physical.  The W/Z accepted-action cut also lists a non-shortcut canonical-Higgs certificate as a root action vertex.

conditional_surface_status: exact-support if a future same-surface canonical O_H / accepted EW-Higgs action certificate lands; source-Higgs and WZ still need their separate production rows and authority gates

parent_statuses.campaign_status: open / active campaign continuing after current shortcut blocks
parent_statuses.degree_one_radial_tangent_oh: exact-support / degree-one radial-tangent O_H uniqueness theorem; same-surface action/LSZ premise and pole rows absent
parent_statuses.full_positive_assembly: open / full positive PR230 closure assembly gate not passed
parent_statuses.neutral_source_mixing_no_go: exact negative boundary / current same-surface Z3 eigenoperator data do not certify a physical neutral scalar transfer or O_H bridge
parent_statuses.os_transfer_kernel_gate: exact support plus negative boundary / OS transfer-kernel artifact absent; equal-time C_ss/C_sx/C_xx covariance rows do not determine a same-surface transfer generator, pole residue, or source-Higgs overlap
parent_statuses.retained_route: open / retained closure not yet reached
parent_statuses.source_higgs_pole_row_contract: open / source-Higgs C_ss/C_sH/C_HH pole-row acceptance contract; strict rows absent on current surface
parent_statuses.source_higgs_time_kernel_gevp: bounded-support / source-Higgs time-kernel GEVP contract; smoke rows are not physics closure
parent_statuses.source_higgs_time_kernel_production_mani: bounded-support / source-Higgs time-kernel production manifest; canonical O_H or physical neutral identity absent and no rows launched
parent_statuses.wz_response_ratio_contract: exact-support / WZ response-ratio identifiability contract; current response rows, matched covariance, strict g2, and accepted same-source action are absent
parent_statuses.wz_same_source_action_cut: exact negative boundary / WZ accepted same-source action minimal certificate cut remains open

proposal_allowed_reason: This block only exposes the shared root vertex and route-specific data cuts.  The current surface still lacks canonical O_H, an accepted same-source EW/Higgs action, source-Higgs pole rows, W/Z response rows, matched covariance, strict g2, and aggregate retained-route approval.

ranked_next_actions.action: derive or supply a non-shortcut same-surface canonical O_H / accepted EW-Higgs action certificate
ranked_next_actions.why: This is the common root vertex for the canonical source-Higgs route and the W/Z accepted-action route.

ranked_next_actions.action: if canonical O_H lands, run production C_ss/C_sH/C_HH time-kernel rows and OS/GEVP pole/overlap gates
ranked_next_actions.why: The degree-one radial theorem and time-kernel harness are support only until physical rows exist.

ranked_next_actions.action: if W/Z action lands first, build W/Z mass-fit response rows, same-source top response, matched covariance, and strict g2
must_not_use: static EW algebra as response rows
ranked_next_actions.why: The response-ratio algebra cancels source normalization only after these route-specific vertices exist.

strict_non_claims: does not claim retained or proposed_retained closure
does not write or validate the accepted same-source EW action certificate
does not identify C_sx/C_xx with C_sH/C_HH before canonical O_H is certified
does not treat the formal GEVP smoke as physical pole authority
does not treat the time-kernel production manifest as launched rows or pole authority
does not use H_unit, yt_ward_identity, observed targets, alpha_LM, plaquette, u0, or unit normalization conventions
does not touch or relaunch the live chunk worker
